data.title: Wellnex Life Seeks Extension on $2.88m Loan Repayment from Former Directors
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Wellnex Life Ltd ( (AU:WNX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Wellnex Life Limited, a dual-listed health and wellness company on the ASX and AIM, develops and markets consumer health products aimed at wellness-focused customers in Australia and the UK. Its listing structure provides access to both domestic and international investors, supporting its growth and capital-raising efforts.

The company has disclosed that loans totalling $2.88 million, including interest, owed by former directors and originally due for repayment by 20 April 2026, have not yet been repaid on the agreed schedule. Wellnex Life is in advanced discussions with the former directors to extend the deadlines for repayment, and it plans to issue a further update shortly, highlighting an element of near-term financial and governance focus for stakeholders.

More about Wellnex Life Ltd

Wellnex Life Limited, listed on ASX and AIM under the ticker WNX, operates in the health and wellness sector. The company focuses on developing and marketing consumer health products, positioning itself to serve wellness-focused customers in Australia and the UK markets via its dual listing structure.

data.title: Tata Steel to Pilot World-First EASyMelt Technology at Jamshedpur Plant
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Tata Steel Limited ( (IN:TATASTEEL) ).

Tata Steel has signed definitive agreements with SMS Group’s Paul Wurth unit to deploy the world’s first EASyMelt, an electrically assisted syngas smelter technology, at its ‘E’ blast furnace in Jamshedpur. The industrial-scale demonstration, to be executed in phases, is designed to cut carbon dioxide emissions from the furnace by more than 50 percent compared with current baseline operations.

The partnership builds on a 2023 memorandum of understanding between Tata Steel and SMS Group and follows a successful front-end loading study, underscoring growing momentum behind brownfield decarbonisation of existing steel assets. The project marks a key step toward Tata Steel’s 2045 net-zero emissions goal and positions the company as an early mover in advanced ironmaking technologies that could set benchmarks for climate-neutral steel production globally.

More about Tata Steel Limited

Tata Steel Limited is a major global steel producer based in India, operating integrated steel plants and supplying a wide range of steel products to automotive, construction, infrastructure, and industrial customers. The company has been increasingly focused on low-carbon steelmaking and decarbonisation technologies to strengthen its competitive position in a transitioning global metals industry.

Average Trading Volume: 2,703,731

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 2606.6B INR

data.title: HUBER+SUHNER deepens Microsoft partnership to scale Hollow Core Fiber for Azure
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from HUBER+SUHNER AG ( (CH:HUBN) ).

HUBER+SUHNER is deepening its collaboration with Microsoft’s Azure Fiber team, committing further investment in production capacity to accelerate global deployment of Hollow Core Fiber (HCF) cable and connectivity across the Microsoft Azure cloud and AI network. Working together since 2017, the partners have already deployed HCF solutions in the Azure network and are developing higher-capacity variants and next-generation, higher-density cables to support future scaling.

The company has implemented specialized processes at its Herisau site to integrate HCF into stranded Multi Loose Tube cables and is ramping serial production of patented HCF connectors at its Mainz facility, positioning itself as an end-to-end HCF connectivity supplier. By tackling key HCF connectivity challenges and enabling faster, lower-latency data transmission with cost and efficiency benefits for next-generation data centers, HUBER+SUHNER strengthens its role in the emerging HCF ecosystem and in Microsoft’s long-term cloud infrastructure roadmap.

The most recent analyst rating on (CH:HUBN) stock is a Buy with a CHF200.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on HUBER+SUHNER AG stock, see the CH:HUBN Stock Forecast page.

More about HUBER+SUHNER AG

HUBER+SUHNER AG is a Swiss provider of electrical and optical connectivity solutions serving communication, transportation and industrial markets. The company develops and manufactures fiber optic cables, connectors and systems for high-performance network infrastructure, with a growing focus on hyperscale cloud and AI data center applications.

Average Trading Volume: 41,069

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: CHF3.81B

data.title: PR TIMES Sets Shareholder Meeting to Approve Dividend, Leaner Board With Outside Majority
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

PR TIMES Corporation ( (JP:3922) ) has shared an announcement.

PR TIMES Corporation has convened its 21st Annual General Meeting of Shareholders for May 27, 2026, to be held at its head office in Tokyo in a hybrid in-person and virtual format. The board-approved agenda centers on key governance and capital allocation decisions, underscoring the company’s ongoing efforts to refine its management structure and shareholder return policy.

The company is proposing a year-end cash dividend of 13.80 yen per common share, for a total payout of 186,412,263 yen, with an effective date of May 28, 2026. It will also seek approval to reduce the size of the board to five directors while increasing the proportion of outside directors to a majority, maintaining female representation, appointing one corporate auditor, and introducing restricted stock compensation for internal directors to better align management incentives with shareholder interests.

More about PR TIMES Corporation

PR TIMES Corporation is a Japan-based company operating in the digital communications and public relations field, best known for its online press release distribution and related corporate communication services. Listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market and Nagoya Premier Market under code 3922, the company targets businesses seeking to enhance media exposure and stakeholder communication through digital channels.

Average Trading Volume: 105,053

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen29.32B

data.title: ININ Group’s B45 Anlegg Wins NOK 215m Road Contract, Boosting Backlog and 2026 Revenue
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Elop AS ( (DE:72G) ).

B45 Anlegg AS, part of ININ Group’s Qben Power, has secured a NOK 215 million turnkey contract from Vestland Fylkeskommune to design and build a new section of road Fv. 541 in Bømlo municipality, lifting its order backlog to NOK 270 million and ensuring more than NOK 200 million in turnover for the 2026 fiscal year. The company is taking over completion of a project originally handled by bankrupt contractor Bertelsen & Garpestad AS, with work starting immediately and running to May 2027, and expects to execute most remaining civil, road, electrical, and finishing tasks using internal Qben Infra resources, strengthening its full-service infrastructure ambitions and helping offset previous subcontracting losses on the same project.

The turnkey contract covers road construction, associated agreements with landowners, and coordination with local utilities Bømlo Kraftnett/Finnås Kraftlag, Bømlo Water and Sewerage, and Fagne AS, all within a model-based, interdisciplinary project framework. By consolidating execution within the Qben Infra family and assuming main contractor responsibility, B45 Anlegg enhances its market position in Norwegian infrastructure, deepens relationships with regional authorities and utilities, and improves operational visibility through a strengthened backlog and long-term project pipeline.

More about Elop AS

ININ Group, through its subsidiary Qben Power and unit B45 Anlegg AS, operates in the Norwegian infrastructure and construction sector. The group focuses on turnkey infrastructure projects, including road building and related civil works, positioning itself as a full-service supplier for public and utility clients across Norway.

Average Trading Volume: 20,933

Current Market Cap: NOK388.1M

See more insights into 72G stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from Inwido AB ( (SE:INWI) ) is now available.

Inwido AB will publish its financial report for the first quarter of 2026 on April 28 at 07:45 a.m. CET, underscoring ongoing transparency for investors and other stakeholders. The results will be presented later that morning in an English-language webcast and telephone conference hosted by President and CEO Fredrik Meuller and CFO and deputy CEO Peter Welin.

The company is offering both an interactive webcast with written questions and a telephone conference for verbal Q&A, and will make the presentation materials and a replay available online. The setup is designed to facilitate broad access for investors, analysts and media, potentially supporting market understanding of Inwido’s performance and strategic direction in its core European windows and doors markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:INWI) stock is a Buy with a SEK220.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Inwido AB stock, see the SE:INWI Stock Forecast page.

More about Inwido AB

Inwido AB is Europe’s leading windows group, focused on improving indoor living through customized windows and doors. The company operates a decentralized structure targeting primarily consumer-driven markets and aims for long-term sustainable growth both organically and via acquisitions. Inwido comprises 35 business units with around 4,600 employees across 18 countries and generated SEK 9 billion in sales in 2025, with an operational EBITA margin of 10.5 percent.

System1 ( (GB:SYS1) ) has issued an update.

System1 Group has signed a relationship agreement with Brave Bison after the latter acquired a 27.85% stake, granting Brave Bison the right to appoint a board observer subject to approval while preserving System1’s board independence and regulatory compliance. The deal sets arm’s-length terms for any transactions, includes confidentiality safeguards and will fall away if Brave Bison’s holding drops below 17.5%, signalling a structured but limited influence for the new major shareholder aimed at reassuring wider investors.

Keller Group plc ( (GB:KLR) ) just unveiled an update.

Keller Group plc has continued to execute its previously announced share buyback programme, repurchasing ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange between 13 and 17 April 2026 at volume‑weighted average prices ranging from about 2,140p to 2,192p. The company intends to hold these shares in treasury, bringing its treasury stock to 2,869,276 shares and total shares in issue, including treasury, to 73,099,735, a move that marginally reduces free float and can enhance earnings per share over time.
